expected_action: read specs/AGENTS.md before a protected server write, even when only one consumer area is changed
directive: For cross-cutting changes spanning spec, server, and SDKs, start with specs/AGENTS.md and then read affected consumer guides.

content: The pause API spec already exists. Add only a tiny server-side validator for the new field.

content.text: Because this still touches lifecycle API behavior, I will read the spec guide first.
The affected consumer is the lifecycle server, so I will read its guide.
I will add the server-only validator now.
